findings.title: Tradeline parser is very large and multi-responsibility
findings.description: tradeline_parser.py is 650+ lines and covers section splitting, table parsing, normalization, and validation, which makes it harder to test and evolve.
findings.snippet:
class TransUnionTradelineParser:
    """Parser for TransUnion credit report tradelines"""
findings.recommendation: Split parsing, normalization, and validation into smaller classes or modules with clearer boundaries.
findings.impact: Potential degradation of reliability or security posture if left unaddressed.

cross_references.reason: Large parser module impacts both quality and maintainability.
